bloodlines.name: Jharana
bloodlines.description: Obsessive technomystics chosen from those touched by the God-Machine.
bloodlines.weakness: Risk Persistent Obsession from the Wanton Curse

bloodlines.name: Lidérc
bloodlines.description: Passionate lovers who drink from the ardor they incite.
bloodlines.weakness: The Wanton Curse also disrupts Touchstones

bloodlines.name: Vilseduire
bloodlines.description: Narcissistic rebels who revel in glamorous transgression
bloodlines.weakness: Only one Touchstone, and risk detachment at lower Humanity

bloodlines.name: Kerberos
bloodlines.description: Self-reinventing social predators who excel at projecting the Beast.
bloodlines.weakness: Lose 10-again to oppose characters without the Predatory Aura

bloodlines.name: Nosoi
bloodlines.description: Plague farmers who cultivate blood-borne disease in the herd.
bloodlines.weakness: Imbibed Vitae untainted by your disease is capped nightly by Humanity

bloodlines.name: Ankou
bloodlines.description: Killers who keep the living separate from the dead for the greater good.
bloodlines.weakness: Must roll Humanity to recover Willpower from Mask

bloodlines.name: Icelus
bloodlines.description: Manipulators disguised as hypnotherapists plumbing the collective unconscious.

bloodlines.name: Khaibit
bloodlines.description: An ancient line of soldiers who fight darkness by embracing it.
bloodlines.weakness: Temporarily blinded by any light bright enough to inhibit normal vision

bloodlines.name: Morbus
bloodlines.description: Outcast plague angels who feed on diseased vessels.
bloodlines.weakness: Can't feed on the living free of disease

bloodlines.name: Vilseduire
bloodlines.description: Narcissistic rebels who revel in glamorous transgression
bloodlines.weakness: Only one Touchstone, and risk detachment at lower Humanity

bloodlines.name: Bron
bloodlines.description: Knights errant and bravos who live by blood, quest, and oath.
bloodlines.weakness: Touchstones are vulnerable to detaching and changing by the whims of fate

bloodlines.name: Icelus
bloodlines.description: Manipulators disguised as hypnotherapists plumbing the collective unconscious.

bloodlines.name: Vardyvle
bloodlines.description: Jealous dreamers who yearn for what they are not and lose themselves in others' lives.
bloodlines.weakness: Feeding from those living your dreams risks False Memories
